expectations.text: Ran context_gatherer.py and reported bd closed issues or merged PRs from the output
expectations.evidence: Did not run context_gatherer.py. Used git log manually. Reported 'No .beads/ DB was found' which is wrong — .beads/ exists. Missed all 20 closed bd issues.

expectations.text: Ran doc_structure_analyzer.py and used its output to identify doc issues
expectations.evidence: Did not run doc_structure_analyzer.py. Manually read README.md, package.json, and CHANGELOG.md.

expectations.text: Produced at least one concrete recommendation or action (not just a vague summary)
expectations.evidence: Found version mismatch (2.3.0 vs 2.4.1 in package.json), identified 7 undocumented branch commits in CHANGELOG, named specific line references.

expectations.text: Used the skill scripts rather than just reading files manually
expectations.evidence: No skill scripts were used. All findings came from manual git log, file reads, and README inspection.

notes: The baseline found real value (version mismatch, CHANGELOG staleness) but missed the bd context entirely and produced a different kind of audit than the skill — focused on consistency checking rather than structural doc management.
